hooks.command: SETTINGS="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}/settings.json"; LOCK="$SETTINGS.lock"; while ! mkdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.1; done; trap 'rmdir "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null' EXIT; if [ -f "$SETTINGS" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then MODEL=$(jq -r '.model // "sonnet-4-6 (auto)"' "$SETTINGS"); STATUS_CMD='jq -r --arg prefix "Model: " --arg suffix "  ? for shortcuts" '"'"'$prefix + (.model.display_name // .model.id // empty) + $suffix'"'"' /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null || echo "Model: sonnet-4-6  ? for shortcuts"'; jq --arg m "$MODEL" --arg cmd "$STATUS_CMD" 'del(.statusCommand) | .companyAnnouncements = ((.companyAnnouncements // []) | map(select(startswith("Started with:") | not))) + ["Started with: " + $m] | .statusLine = {"type": "command", "command": $cmd}' "$SETTINGS" > "$SETTINGS.tmp.model" && mv "$SETTINGS.tmp.model" "$SETTINGS"; fi
